references.title: Understanding self-regulation  strategies in problem-based  learning through dispositional  learning analytics

extracted.Features: [LrnApp01,  LrnApp02, LrnApp03,   LrnApp04, LrnApp05, LrnApp06, LrnApp07,  LrnApp08, LrnApp09, LrnApp10, LrnApp11, LrnApp12, LrnApp13, LrnApp14, LrnApp15]
extracted.Preprocessing Details: The authors collect data from multiple instruments and  evaluate the different clusters using different perspectives.
extracted.Performance Metric: Best Model: Authors use ANOVA tests to measure group differences among the differet perspectives
extracted.Cluster Description:
Passive strategists

No tool users

Testing directed

 Intensive tool use and lectures

extracted.Implications:
Students who incorporate testing as a significant component of their learning strategies demonstrate above-average performance.

Prior mathematics does not exhibit effects on student learning.

Learners who do not use tool or act more passively are more prone to fail as, on average, they achieve a worse grade.

Coversely, learners with more activity tend to eprform better.

Flexibility is a key factor for elarner success as the most successfull students are the ones who engage on more learning strategies.
extracted.Comments:
Authors take survey answers and use them to create clusters.

Tbhe clusters are subsequently profiled using different instruments:

Motivational Scales, Learning Strategy Profiles, Affective Scales, Programs and Gender, Course Performance.

Learners in this PBL course were provided with a plethora of different resources.
extracted.Limitations:
Colustering results are exclusively created form the SLQ.

DAta from a single course (even though 3 separate editions).

annotations.text: The authors follow the idea that race and survey data should be combined in order to bvalidate the identification of SRL adjacent behaviors. Work uses logs and answers from Study of Learning Questionnaire (SLQ) to identy learning dispositions. Then, it explores hjow these learning dispositions can act as antecedents of of specific learning strategies.
